title: Project Better Server
description: Add new mechanics that made you server and geme better
body:
- Add new machanigs for your Server

**Important** 
> I want to recreate this mod that becouse this Mod will no longer get updates.
> The "new" mod will be releast on my own accound not on this Organisation.
> I activate ~~BG(?)~~ for you on the Alpha
> this mod will be get the name(Alpha PBS)
> if you have intres on helping me send me on the Discord Server a Massage.

**ALL FEATURES**
> -6 new gemstones
> 
> -/home commands. You can set a home and teleport to them.
> 
> -Orbital Strike enchantments. Work like an orbital strike canon.
> 
> -/trades. Thats like the /ah.
> 
> -Ban schulker Enchantment. If you encahnt a schulker with this you can ban any player in a chunk.
> 
> -Ban saver. Saves you from Ban schulker.
> 
> -Challange commands. you can start custom challenges(see "**All challenges**").

**All challenges**
> - all_items -> find all Items/blocks in an random sequence
